title: Aluminum Drops as Trump Moves to Narrow Levies on Metal Products
summary: Aluminum prices fell after reports that President Donald Trump is planning to narrow US import tariffs on some aluminum and steel products. The piece says the metal dropped as much as 2.7% on the London Metal Exchange, with traders reacting to expectations that reduced levies could affect the market.

title: Aluminum rose to 3,402.48 USD/T on June 22, 2026
summary: Aluminum prices were slightly higher in the latest market update, rising to 3,402.48 USD/T, a gain of 0.05% from the previous day. The data also shows the commodity has fallen 7.50% over the past month, despite remaining far above year-ago levels.

title: Aluminium Price Today - Investing.com
summary: Investing.com’s commodity page shows aluminium futures trading around 3,406 to 3,408, slightly above the previous close. This indicates a largely stable session in the latest market snapshot, with prices moving only modestly intraday.

title: Aluminum Futures, Sep-2026 (ALI=F)
summary: Yahoo Finance shows aluminum futures trading at 3,475.25, up 2.71% at the time of the quote. The market page suggests a stronger short-term move in futures compared with other commodity price trackers in the same period.

title: US aluminium smelters vie with Big Tech for scarce power
summary: Reuters reports that U.S. aluminium smelters are competing with large technology companies for limited electricity supply, which is a major constraint on production. The article says U.S. annual production has fallen to around 700,000 tons and notes that several smelters are shut or running below capacity.

title: AI data centers' massive demand for aluminum is crushing the US aluminum industry
summary: This article says rising demand from AI data centers is intensifying pressure on the U.S. aluminium sector. It notes that only a handful of smelting operations remain active and that current domestic output is far below U.S. demand, even if existing capacity were fully utilized.

title: New filter captures and recycles aluminum from manufacturing waste
summary: MIT engineers developed a nanofiltration process designed to reduce hazardous waste from aluminum production. In lab tests, the membrane captured more than 99% of aluminum ions from solutions modeled on aluminum plant waste streams, with the goal of upcycling the captured aluminum back into production.

title: US Steel Costs Impacted by War, Trade Deals
summary: This video discusses how war-related disruptions and trade deals are affecting U.S. steel costs. It also says steel pricing has been rising for nearly nine months and suggests the upcycle may still have some room to run.

title: Steel Price News: Are Prices About to Drop? Latest Hot Rolled Coil ...
summary: This article provides current steel market pricing across several products, including hot-rolled coil, cold-rolled steel, coated steel, and steel plate. It is framed around whether steel prices are about to decline and offers a market snapshot for buyers and traders.

title: Steel - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News
summary: Trading Economics reports that steel prices slipped slightly on June 18, 2026, while remaining above their level from a month earlier. The page also tracks broader price movement and historical trends in the steel market.

title: Steel prices, news & market analysis

title: 3 innovations in green steel
summary: This article highlights recent developments in green steel, including hydrogen-based steelmaking, a new commercial hydrogen steel plant in Sweden, and Boston Metal's molten oxide electrolysis approach. It also notes Japan’s Kobe Steel developing a lower-coke technique for blast furnaces, showing multiple pathways toward lower-carbon steel production.

title: Copper futures hold near recent levels as market watches supply and demand signals
summary: Copper futures were reported around $6.3 per pound on Monday, extending recent losses. The update attributed price pressure to resumed exports of copper concentrate from Rio Tinto's Oyu Tolgoi operations, alongside broader market attention on supply developments.

title: Copper prices surge on geopolitical tensions, supply shortages, and AI demand
summary: The article says copper prices are up about 9% since the Iran war and are approaching a January peak. It highlights a mix of geopolitical risk, structural supply shortages, and AI-driven demand as key forces supporting the market.

title: Copper market outlook remains tight amid limited new supply
summary: Fastmarkets says copper's long-term outlook is constrained by the industry's limited ability to bring new supply online quickly enough to meet demand. It points to permitting delays and broader supply-side bottlenecks as persistent market themes.

title: Copper Market News & Forecasts
summary: Fastmarkets reports on copper market developments, including recent changes in own-sourced copper output from Glencore’s African assets. The snippet highlights a 68% year-on-year surge in output from KCC and Mutanda in the Democratic Republic of Congo to 67,900 tonnes.

title: Copper facts
summary: Natural Resources Canada provides copper production statistics and market context. The page notes that global refined copper production increased by 3.8% in 2024, reaching 27.5 million tonnes from 26.5 million tonnes in 2023.

title: Copper Statistics and Information
summary: The USGS page provides authoritative background data on copper supply, demand, and production trends. It is a general reference source rather than a breaking-news article, but it is useful for tracking current copper production and capacity context.

title: Nickel Market Recalibrates After Explosive Trading Week
summary: Nickel prices stabilized after a volatile week in which the market moved sharply higher before pulling back. The article says traders were reassessing supply risks, Indonesian policy signals, Chinese buying, and a growing inventory overhang.

title: Nickel rose to 17,840.25 USD/T on June 22, 2026
summary: Trading Economics reports that nickel gained 1.74% on June 22, 2026, indicating a firmer market in the latest session. It also notes that the metal is still down over the past month, showing recent volatility despite the day’s rebound.

title: Nickel Futures Price Today

title: World's Biggest Nickel Mine in Indonesia Told to Slash Output
summary: The world's largest nickel mine in Indonesia, PT Weda Bay Nickel, has been notified to drastically cut its ore production quota from 42 million tons in 2025 to 12 million tons in 2026. The company plans to apply for a revision of this decision as Indonesia seeks to boost global prices for its key export commodity used in stainless steel and EV batteries.

title: Indonesia navigates nickel market with output cuts, policy shifts
summary: Indonesia confirmed plans to cut nickel production in 2026 to support prices and government revenue while cracking down on environmentally harmful mining operations. The country is reversing its mining quota policy to regulate supply volatility as actual production continues to lag behind targets.

title: Nickel price spikes as risks to supply grow in top producer Indonesia
summary: Nickel futures rallied sharply on the London Metal Exchange after reports that 10% to 15% of high-grade nickel pig iron capacity at Indonesia's Weda Bay Industrial Park will undergo rotational maintenance. This supply risk in the world's top nickel producer has intensified market concerns about future availability.

title: Unleashing sustainable nickel production for a net zero future
summary: This article examines how optimizing nickel production can support a more sustainable battery industry. It highlights the importance of greenhouse-gas reduction, energy efficiency, lower water use, stakeholder engagement, and stronger ESG disclosure in the nickel sector.

title: Green nickel for sustainable electrification
summary: Researchers at the Max Planck Institute for Sustainable Materials developed a carbon-free, energy-saving method for extracting nickel using hydrogen plasma instead of carbon. The process can reduce CO2 emissions substantially and may make low-grade nickel ores more viable for sustainable battery and stainless-steel production.

title: Nickel Industry News, Views and Commentary - Chronickels
summary: This page introduces ongoing coverage of sustainability, treatment processes, and innovation in nickel production. It emphasizes the idea that nickel can be sustainable across the full value chain if mining, manufacturing, use, and end-of-life actors all take responsibility.

title: Italy's Cogne Acciai Speciali acquires 65 percent of Inox
summary: Cogne Acciai Speciali has completed the acquisition of a 65% stake in Com.steel Inox S.p.A., an Italian stainless steel and nickel alloy recycler, for €24 million. This upstream integration supports the company's circularity commitments and operational optimization.
